EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ISegment

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that identify a segment. A segment is a way of getting between two endpoints.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("F2C4F0DE-C5AE-11D0-8307-0000F8034032")]
public interface ISegment : ICurve, IGeometry

VertexAttributeAware[esriGeometryAttributes]

Indicates if the segment is aware of the specified attribute type.

Sample Snippet

Densify(int, double, out int, out ILine)

Densify segment into the specified number of smaller segments. This method is intended for internal use only.

void Densify(int cInSlots, double maxDeviation, out int pcOutSegments, out ILine segments)

Parameters

cInSlots int
maxDeviation double
pcOutSegments int
segments ILine

GetDistanceAtVertexAttribute(esriGeometryAttributes, double, bool)

Gets the distance corresponding to the attribute value along the segment.

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes
attributeValue double
asRatio bool

Returns

double

Sample Snippet

GetPointsAtVertexAttribute(esriGeometryAttributes, double, double, out IPointCollection)

Gets the point at the location corresponding to the attribute value.

Parameters

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes
attributeValue double
lateralOffset double

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetSubSegmentBetweenVertexAttributes(esriGeometryAttributes, double, double, out ISegment)

Gets the segment corresponding to the extent along the segment between the 'from' and 'to' attribute values.

void GetSubSegmentBetweenVertexAttributes(esriGeometryAttributes attributeType, double fromAttribute, double toAttribute, out ISegment outSegment)

Parameters

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes
fromAttribute double
toAttribute double
outSegment ISegment

SplitAtVertexAttribute(esriGeometryAttributes, double, out ISegment, out ISegment)

Splits the segment in two segments at the location corresponding to the attribute value.

void SplitAtVertexAttribute(esriGeometryAttributes attributeType, double attributeValue, out ISegment fromSegment, out ISegment toSegment)

Parameters

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes
attributeValue double
fromSegment ISegment
toSegment ISegment

Sample Snippet

SplitDivideLength(double, double, bool, ref int, ref ISegment)

Divide segment into smaller segments of the specified length.

Parameters

Offset double
Length double
asRatio bool
numSplitSegments int
splitSegments ISegment
